languages.text: {n}Сенешаль безмолвно вслушивается в вокс-переговоры. Ее лицо каменеет все сильнее с каждым услышанным словом.{/n} "Элана — слугам Золотого Трона. Передаю координаты размещения периметральных..." {n}Наконец, заметив ваше присутствие, Ювенна резко прерывает передачу и разворачивается к вам.{/n} "Трон Терры, что это значит?! Какого..." {n}Она возмущенно задыхается, проглотив бранное слово.{/n} "Что вы оба здесь делаете?!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Сенешаль безмолвно вслушивается в вокс-переговоры. Ее лицо каменеет все сильнее с каждым услышанным словом.{/n} "Элана — слугам Золотого Трона. Передаю координаты размещения периметральных..." {n}Наконец, заметив ваше присутствие, Ювенна резко прерывает передачу и разворачивается к вам.{/n} "Трон Терры, что это значит?! Какого..." {n}Она возмущенно задыхается, проглотив бранное слово.{/n} "Что вы оба здесь делаете?!"
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: {n}The Seneschal listens silently to the vox-conversation. Her face hardens further with every word she hears:{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Transmitting the coordinates of perimeter..." {n}When she finally notices your presence, Juvenna abruptly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you.{/n} "Throne of Terra, what is the meaning of this? What the—" {n}She sucks in a furious breath, biting back the swear word.{/n} "What are you two doing here?"
languages.original_text: {n}Сенешаль безмолвно вслушивается в вокс-переговоры. Ее лицо каменеет все сильнее с каждым услышанным словом.{/n} "Элана — слугам Золотого Трона. Какого..." {n}Она возмущенно задыхается, проглотив бранное слово.{/n} "Что вы оба здесь делаете?!"

Transmitting the coordinates of perimeter..." {n}When she finally notices your presence, Juvenna abruptly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you.{/n} "Throne of Terra, what is the meaning of this? What the—" {n}She sucks in a furious breath, biting back the swear word.{/n} "What are you two doing here?"

{n}The Seneschal listens silently to the vox-conversation. Her face hardens further with every word she hears:{/n} "Elana to Ordos. Coordinates to strike the command headquarters: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma..." {n}When she finally notices your presence, Juvenna abruptly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you.{/n} "Throne of Terra, what is the meaning of this? What the—" {n}She sucks in a furious breath, biting back the swear word.{/n} "What are you two doing here?"

What the—" {n}She sucks in a furious breath, biting back the swear word.{/n} "What are you two doing here?"

What the—" {n}She sucks in a furious breath, biting back the swear word.{/n} "What are you two doing here?"

languages.text: {n}总领沉默地听着音阵中的对话，越往下听，脸色越发阴沉：{/n}“埃拉娜呼叫黄金王座仆从。正在传输坐标……”{n}当尤文娜终于注意到你们的存在时，她猛地掐断通讯，转身面向你们。{/n}“泰拉黄金王座在上，这是什么意思？这他——”{n}她恼怒地倒吸一口气，硬生生把脏字咽了回去。{/n}“你们俩在这儿干什么？”
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal listens silently to the vox-conversation. Her face hardens further with every word she hears:{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Transmitting the coordinates of perimeter..." {n}When she finally notices your presence, Juvenna abruptly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you.{/n} "Throne of Terra, what is the meaning of this? What the—" {n}She sucks in a furious breath, biting back the swear word.{/n} "What are you two doing here?"

traits.locale_text: {n}总领沉默地听着音阵中的对话，越往下听，脸色越发阴沉：{/n}“埃拉娜呼叫黄金王座仆从。正在传输坐标……”{n}当尤文娜终于注意到你们的存在时，她猛地掐断通讯，转身面向你们。{/n}“泰拉黄金王座在上，这是什么意思？这他——”{n}她恼怒地倒吸一口气，硬生生把脏字咽了回去。{/n}“你们俩在这儿干什么？”

languages.text: {n}La sénéchale écoute la conversation-vox en silence. Son visage se durcit à chaque mot qu'elle entend.{/n} « Elana aux serviteurs du Trône d'Or. Transmission des coordonnées du périmètre... » {n}Lorsque Juvenna remarque enfin votre présence, elle interrompt brusquement la transmission et se tourne vers vous.{/n} « Par le Trône de Terra, qu'est-ce que ça signifie ? Nom d... » {n}Elle inspire furieusement pour réprimer le juron qu'elle s'apprêtait à prononcer.{/n} « Que faites-vous ici, vous deux ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal listens silently to the vox-conversation. Her face hardens further with every word she hears:{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Transmitting the coordinates of perimeter..." {n}When she finally notices your presence, Juvenna abruptly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you.{/n} "Throne of Terra, what is the meaning of this? What the—" {n}She sucks in a furious breath, biting back the swear word.{/n} "What are you two doing here?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La sénéchale écoute la conversation-vox en silence. Son visage se durcit à chaque mot qu'elle entend.{/n} « Elana aux serviteurs du Trône d'Or. Transmission des coordonnées du périmètre... » {n}Lorsque Juvenna remarque enfin votre présence, elle interrompt brusquement la transmission et se tourne vers vous.{/n} « Par le Trône de Terra, qu'est-ce que ça signifie ? Nom d... » {n}Elle inspire furieusement pour réprimer le juron qu'elle s'apprêtait à prononcer.{/n} « Que faites-vous ici, vous deux ? »

languages.text: {n}Seneşal, voks konuşmasını sessizce dinliyor. Duyduğu her kelimeyle yüzü daha da sertleşiyor.{/n} "Elana'dan Altın Taht'ın hizmetkârlarına. Koordinatları iletiyorum..." {n}Juvenna, nihayet varlığını fark ettiğinde aniden yayını kesip sana dönüyor.{/n} "Terra'nın Tahtı aşkına! Bunun anlamı ne? Ne..." {n}Küfrü yutarak öfkeyle soluyor.{/n} "Siz ikiniz burada ne yapıyorsunuz?"
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal listens silently to the vox-conversation. Her face hardens further with every word she hears:{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Transmitting the coordinates of perimeter..." {n}When she finally notices your presence, Juvenna abruptly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you.{/n} "Throne of Terra, what is the meaning of this? What the—" {n}She sucks in a furious breath, biting back the swear word.{/n} "What are you two doing here?"

Koordinatları iletiyorum..." {n}Juvenna, nihayet varlığını fark ettiğinde aniden yayını kesip sana dönüyor.{/n} "Terra'nın Tahtı aşkına! Bunun anlamı ne? Ne..." {n}Küfrü yutarak öfkeyle soluyor.{/n} "Siz ikiniz burada ne yapıyorsunuz?"

languages.text: {n}La Senescal escucha en silencio a la conversación por voco. Su rostro se endurece a cada palabra que escucha:{/n} «Elana a sirvientes del Trono Dorado. Transmitiendo coordenadas del perímetro...». {n}Cuando finalmente se percata de vuestra presencia, Juvenna corta bruscamente la transmisión y se gira hacia vosotr{mf|o|a}s.{/n} «Por el Trono de Terra, ¿qué significa esto? ¿Qué di...?». {n}Respira hondo, enfurecida, y contiene la palabra que estaba a punto de decir.{/n} «¿Qué hacen ustedes aquí?».
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal listens silently to the vox-conversation. Her face hardens further with every word she hears:{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Transmitting the coordinates of perimeter..." {n}When she finally notices your presence, Juvenna abruptly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you.{/n} "Throne of Terra, what is the meaning of this? What the—" {n}She sucks in a furious breath, biting back the swear word.{/n} "What are you two doing here?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La Senescal escucha en silencio a la conversación por voco. Su rostro se endurece a cada palabra que escucha:{/n} «Elana a sirvientes del Trono Dorado. Transmitiendo coordenadas del perímetro...». {n}Cuando finalmente se percata de vuestra presencia, Juvenna corta bruscamente la transmisión y se gira hacia vosotr{mf|o|a}s.{/n} «Por el Trono de Terra, ¿qué significa esto? ¿Qué di...?». {n}Respira hondo, enfurecida, y contiene la palabra que estaba a punto de decir.{/n} «¿Qué hacen ustedes aquí?».

languages.text: {n}Die Truchsessin lauscht der Vox-Unterhaltung schweigend. Ihre Miene erstarrt mit jedem Wort mehr zu Stein:{/n} "Elana an Diener des Goldenen Throns. Übertrage Koordinaten der Perimeter ..." {n}Als sie dich bemerkt, beendet sie die Übertragung hastig und wendet sich dir zu.{/n} "Beim Thron von Terra, was hat das zu bedeuten? Was zur ..." {n}Sie holt wütend Luft und unterdrückt ihren Fluch.{/n} "Was macht Ihr beiden hier?"
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal listens silently to the vox-conversation. Her face hardens further with every word she hears:{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Transmitting the coordinates of perimeter..." {n}When she finally notices your presence, Juvenna abruptly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you.{/n} "Throne of Terra, what is the meaning of this? What the—" {n}She sucks in a furious breath, biting back the swear word.{/n} "What are you two doing here?"

Übertrage Koordinaten der Perimeter ..." {n}Als sie dich bemerkt, beendet sie die Übertragung hastig und wendet sich dir zu.{/n} "Beim Thron von Terra, was hat das zu bedeuten? Was zur ..." {n}Sie holt wütend Luft und unterdrückt ihren Fluch.{/n} "Was macht Ihr beiden hier?"

languages.text: {n}家令長はヴォックスの会話に耳を傾け、彼女の顔はさらに険しくなる。{/n}「黄金の王座のエレナと召使。周辺の座標を送信中…」{n}彼女はようやくあなたの存在に気づき、ジュベナは突然送信を遮り、あなたの方を向く。{/n}「テラ王座、これは何の意図か？何の」{n}彼女は怒りに震え、罵倒語を飲み込む。{/n}「君たち二人はここに何をしているんだ？」

What the—" {n}She sucks in a furious breath, biting back the swear word.{/n} "What are you two doing here?"
